<?php /** * This file is part of the ZBateson\MailMimeParser project. * * @license http://opensource.org/licenses/bsd-license.php BSD */ namespace ZBateson\MailMimeParser\Header\Consumer; /** * Interface defining a consumer service class. * * @author Zaahid Bateson */ interface IConsumerService { /** * Invokes parsing of a header's value into header parts. * * @param string $value the raw header value * @return \ZBateson\MailMimeParser\Header\IHeaderPart[] the array of parsed * parts */ public function __invoke(string $value) : array; }
